sections.title: Commitment to accessibility
paragraphs: Hart County is committed to ensuring that our website is accessible to all users, including individuals with disabilities.
Our goal is to meet or exceed the accessibility standards outlined in the Web Content Accessibility Guidelines (WCAG) 2.2 Level AA wherever possible.

sections.title: Accessibility features
list: Visible focus indicators for keyboard users
Alternative text descriptions for images and non-text content
Responsive design for mobile devices and tablets
Proper heading structure to support screen readers
Links and navigation elements that are clearly identifiable

sections.title: Ongoing improvements
paragraphs: Accessibility is an ongoing effort. Hart County continually works to improve the usability and accessibility of our website as technology and standards evolve.
While we strive to ensure that all content is accessible, some older documents or third-party content may not yet fully meet accessibility standards.

sections.title: External websites
paragraphs: This website may link to external websites operated by other government agencies, organizations, or private entities.
Hart County does not control the accessibility of external sites and cannot guarantee their accessibility compliance.

sections.title: Need assistance or found an issue?
paragraphs: If you experience difficulty accessing any content on the Hart County website or need assistance with any part of our site, please contact us.
When reporting an accessibility issue, please include the web page address (URL), a description of the problem, and the type of assistive technology you were using if applicable.
